scope: zero-training construction of an assignment-specific IID calibration split inside the original GaugeFlow train partition while preserving the original validation/test partitions as untouched OOD stress panels

split.grouping_unit: material_id; all candidate carriers of one material remain together
split.duplicate_definition: exact (embedding_key, ordered child coloring) input-output duplicate; duplicates must remain in one role
split.same_input_different_output_policy: allowed across IID roles because repeated outcomes for one target-free carrier are required to calibrate a conditional probability law

decision_rule.pass: freeze the split manifest for a future from-scratch oracle-C IID assignment Gate; the existing Q1 split remains the distinct OOD stress panel
decision_rule.fail: repair only split grouping/support; do not train assignment or start downstream Gates
decision_rule.boundary: This split cannot qualify assignment, generated-C, p(N), L1/M1, tensor work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
